front: Painting: men at a table laughing as they compose an insulting letter to Ottoman Sultan Mehmed IV; fat man in white fur cap
back: Reply of the Zaporozhian Cossacks (Ilya Repin)

front: Painting: bought by Alexander III for 35,000 rubles — most expensive painting sold in Russia at the time
back: Reply of the Zaporozhian Cossacks (Ilya Repin)

front: Painting: shirtless gambler with a kobza (lute) next to a deck of cards; man with quill at center modelled on the historian consulted
back: Reply of the Zaporozhian Cossacks (Ilya Repin)

front: Painting: letter calls sultan 'Goat-fucker of Alexandria,' 'catamite of Tartary,' and 'the Devil shits and your army swallow it'
back: Reply of the Zaporozhian Cossacks (Ilya Repin)

front: Painting: hunched woman in black sees her gaunt exiled son walk through the door (also: teenage girls look toward a man entering from a hallway; mother rises from armchair)

back: Sadko in the Underwater Kingdom (Ilya Repin)

front: Artist: while studying under Marià Fortuny, painted a sitting African woman nicknamed 'Ebony' by critics
